GREEN AND AS STAN GREEN $34,503.04 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $600.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,928.04, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST IS TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS TOOL TIME EQUIPMENT RENTAL & SALES, LLC AND STANLEY GREEN POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY: DITCH WITCH SK750, 2010 DITCH WITCH TRENCHER, 2006 J&C JC2 TRAILER. IF PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION OF SAID PROPERTY AND SELLS IT AT A SALE, PLAINTIFF SHALL APPLY THE PROCEEDS TO REDUCE THE AMOUNT OWED DEFENDANTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Brenda Crow, CSR#10503 , 415-551-0330, bcrow@sftc.org (514)

Daniel Zarchy Buchalter, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Tool Time Equipment Rental & Sales and Stanley Green.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $34503.04
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $600.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37928.04
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
